title: Notify the person who last updated
excerpt: Option to select the “last updated” column to use as the person to notify option in the automations

posts.author: Julie2 (Julie2)
posts.cookedHtml: Option to select the “last updated” column to use as the person to notify option in the automations

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Julie2 ,

No we can’t use the last updated column to notify the person.

However we can do this with an alternate way.

We can create a custom recipe for fulfilling the purpose.

Regards,
Aquib
